title: Just Give Me a Reason
why_this_song: Just Give Me a Reason by Pink (2012) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 11 times; first heard in: "And we can learn to love again"
Appears 9 times; first heard in: "Just a second, we're not broken, just bent"
Appears 9 times; first heard in: "Just a second, we're not broken, just bent"
Appears 9 times; first heard in: "Just a second, we're not broken, just bent"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "It's in the stars"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: And we can learn to love again
It's been written in the scars on our hearts
That we're not broken, just bent
And we can learn to love again

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "learn" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "learn" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "we're" in the whole song?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:

excerpts.text: Your head is running wild again
No, nothing is as bad as it seems

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Just Give Me a Reason" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Just Give Me a Reason" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Just Give Me a Reason" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Just Give Me a Reason", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Just Give Me a Reason" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Just Give Me a Reason" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
